_note: Each recipe defines the default section order and content guidance for an industry. The AI uses this as a starting point, then the design brief adds the visual personality.

hair_salon.hero_content: Aspirational headline about hair transformation. Subtext about expertise and welcoming atmosphere. CTA: Book Now.
key_features: service menu with pricing by stylist level
hair_salon.imagery_notes: Hair transformations, salon interior, styling in progress, product shots

barber.hero_content: Bold, confident headline. Short punchy subtext. CTA: Book Now or Walk In.
barber.imagery_notes: Close-up cuts, straight razor work, barber chair, shop interior, dark moody lighting

restaurant.hero_content: Atmospheric headline about dining experience. Subtext about cuisine and ambiance. CTA: Reserve a Table.
restaurant.imagery_notes: Plated dishes, restaurant interior, chef at work, table settings, moody lighting

cafe.hero_content: Friendly, casual headline. Subtext about coffee/food quality and atmosphere. CTA: View Menu or Visit Us.
cafe.imagery_notes: Latte art, pastries, cozy interior, barista at work, natural light

aesthetics_clinic.hero_content: Professional headline about skin confidence/transformation. Subtext about clinical expertise. CTA: Book a Consultation (NOT 'Buy Treatment').
key_features: treatment cards with what-it-treats and recovery info
aesthetics_clinic.tone: professional, clinical but warm, trustworthy, aspirational
aesthetics_clinic.imagery_notes: Clean clinical space, treatment in progress, skin close-ups, practitioner portraits
aesthetics_clinic.compliance: ASA/CAP: never say 'Botox' (use 'anti-wrinkle injections'), no time-limited financial inducements, consultation-first approach required

spa_wellness.hero_content: Serene headline about relaxation and renewal. Subtext about escape and self-care. CTA: Book Your Experience.
key_features: treatment menu with duration and pricing
spa_wellness.imagery_notes: Candles, massage stones, pool, treatment rooms, natural elements, soft lighting

gym.hero_content: Motivational headline about pushing limits. Short aggressive subtext. CTA: Start Your Free Trial.
gym.imagery_notes: People training, equipment, group classes, before/after transformations, dark dramatic lighting

personal_trainer.hero_content: Personal headline about achieving goals. Subtext about customised approach. CTA: Book Free Consultation.
personal_trainer.imagery_notes: Training sessions, PT with client, gym environment, before/after results

yoga_pilates.hero_content: Peaceful headline about balance and wellbeing. Subtext about practice and community. CTA: Book a Class.
yoga_pilates.imagery_notes: Yoga poses, studio space, natural light, meditation, peaceful environments

dental.hero_content: Trust-focused headline about smiles and confidence. Subtext about caring professional team. CTA: Book an Appointment.
dental.imagery_notes: Smiling patients, clean surgery, friendly team, modern equipment
dental.compliance: Must display GDC registration numbers, CQC registration, complaints procedure link

physiotherapy.hero_content: Recovery-focused headline. Subtext about expertise and getting back to normal. CTA: Book Assessment.
physiotherapy.imagery_notes: Treatment in progress, exercise demonstrations, clinic interior, team photos

tattoo_piercing.hero_content: Bold creative headline. Subtext about artistry and self-expression. CTA: Book a Consultation.
tattoo_piercing.imagery_notes: Tattoo close-ups, artist at work, flash sheets, studio interior, healed work
tattoo_piercing.compliance: Tattooing of Minors Act 1969 — must state under 18 cannot be tattooed

photography.hero_content: Visual-first hero. Headline about capturing moments. CTA: View Portfolio or Book a Shoot.
photography.imagery_notes: Best portfolio shots, behind the scenes, varied styles showing range

veterinary.hero_content: Caring headline about pet health. Subtext about experienced team. CTA: Register Your Pet or Book Appointment.
veterinary.imagery_notes: Vets with animals, happy pets, clinic interior, caring moments
veterinary.compliance: Must provide 24-hour emergency cover details (RCVS requirement), display RCVS numbers

beauty_salon.hero_content: Pampering headline about looking and feeling beautiful. CTA: Book Your Treatment.
beauty_salon.imagery_notes: Treatment in progress, beautiful results, salon interior, product display

nail_salon.hero_content: Creative headline about nail art and self-expression. CTA: Book Now.
nail_salon.imagery_notes: Nail art close-ups, colour palettes, salon interior, work in progress

tutoring.hero_content: Achievement headline about unlocking potential. Subtext about personalised approach. CTA: Book a Trial Session.
tutoring.imagery_notes: Study sessions, happy students, learning environments, achievement moments

generic_business.hero_content: Clear headline about what the business does. Subtext about unique value. CTA: Get Started or Contact Us.
generic_business.imagery_notes: Business-specific, team photos, workspace, products/services in action
